## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD improvement
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this change? -->

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes locally
- [ ] `dotnet publish` (AOT) passes locally
- [ ] Installer runs correctly on a clean Windows environment
- [ ] Idempotency: re-running skips completed steps
- [ ] Atomic install: failed install doesn't corrupt existing installation

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
